text.headline: The Geographic Arc
text.text: A research journey across doctoral training, postdoctoral research, and faculty leadership in genome integrity science.

text.headline: College Station / Texas A&M
text.text: Eric C. Greene's doctoral foundation in Biochemistry at Texas A&M University under Dorothy Shippen.

text.headline: Bethesda / National Institutes of Health
text.text: Postdoctoral research at NIH with Kiyoshi Mizuuchi before the faculty chapter.

text.headline: New York / Columbia University
text.text: Professor in Biochemistry and Molecular Biophysics, pioneering single-molecule imaging techniques.
